alt: Attendees working at long cabaret-style tables with laptops in a bright, vaulted seminar room at St Anne's College, Oxford, during the first Oxford Agentic Bootcamp.
A registration desk draped in a St Anne's College, University of Oxford tablecloth, with sign-in sheets laid out ready for arrivals.
A hand holds a gold-edged calligraphy place card in front of a laptop screen showing a new project being created for the bootcamp build exercise.
A speaker presenting to the room beside a screen reading "Start with the job, not the tool".
A speaker standing at a laptop beside a screen reading "Three years, three eras", tracing the shift from prompting to agents.
Two attendees smiling together at their working table during the bootcamp.
Four attendees standing together at the end of the day.
Four attendees standing together in the seminar room doorway at the close of the bootcamp.
Four attendees photographed together after the final showcase session.
